CustomField.description: Calculated census date for status field. Only consider the date in term if the census date in study offering is empty.
CustomField.formula: IF( ISNULL(Census_Date__c), IF(ISNULL( Academic_Term__r.Census_Date__c), null, Academic_Term__r.Census_Date__c ), Census_Date__c )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated census date for status field. Only consider the date in term if the census date in study offering is empty.
CustomField.label: Census Date
